text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating vegetables. It means finding a balance between different parts of your daily routine. A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and proteins gives your body energy. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling for 30 minutes, keeps your heart strong. However, many people forget the importance of sleep; eight hours each night helps your brain recover. Equally important is mental health. Taking breaks from work and spending time with friends can reduce stress. Remember to create a work-life balance by setting aside time for hobbies. When all these elements work together, you feel happier and more energetic every day.
